text: The barrel contains burning paper and other flaming refuse.
An old barrel, made from steel.
An old barrel, made from steel.
A stack of ancient rubber tires. They have vulcanized and hardened, probably due to the heat.
This door looks very secure. It provides protection from the outside world elements and dangerous creatures.
A Vault computer terminal, hooked into the main Vault computer.
A support column, providing stress relief for the entire complex.
A Vault computer terminal, hooked into the main Vault computer.
A Vault computer terminal, hooked into the main Vault computer.
A green-screen display monitor, showing various bits of data. A few bytes occasionally show up.
A green-screen display monitor, showing various bits of data.
A large-scale THT entertainment tape player. No new movies have been made in 80 years.
A series of three display monitors, showing various bits of data.
A set of three display monitors, showing various bits of data from around the Vault.
It's still a door after closer examination.
It's still a door after closer examination.
An air vent, supplying processed and cleaned air to the entire vault complex.
An air vent, supplying processed and cleaned air to the entire vault complex.
A heavy door, constructed to survive all sorts of damage and trauma.
A heavy door, constructed to survive all sorts of damage and trauma.
An hydraulic life, designed to help provide support, power and communication lines to the Overseer's platform.
If you've seen one monitor, you've seen them all.
A computer monitor, displaying various bits of data.
Standard Vault-Tec grating, providing a base for the Overseer's pedestal.
Some pipes. After closer examination, they are still pipes.
A standard Vault-Tec column support system.
A standard Vault-Tec column support system.
A bed, it looks pretty comfortable after what you have been sleeping on.
This is an elevator. It goes up and down levels in the vault complex.
It's a chair. Too bad you don't have time to sit down and relax.
It's a chair. Too bad you don't have time to sit down and relax.
It's a chair. Too bad you don't have time to sit down and relax.

An APU cleans the old air to provide new air for the complex. This one is broken.
It's a chair. Too bad you don't have time to sit down and relax.
It's a chair. Too bad you don't have time to sit down and relax.
It's a chair. Too bad you don't have time to sit down and relax.
It's a chair. Too bad you don't have time to sit down and relax.
This Video Display Unit has a variety of computer monitors and other screens. It looks very, very busy.
This Video Display Unit has a variety of computer monitors and other screens. It looks very, very busy.
It's a chair. It looks mighty comfortable.
It's a chair. It looks mighty comfortable.
It's a chair. It looks mighty comfortable.
It's a chair. It looks mighty comfortable.
It's a table. Before tables, people had to keep their stuff on the floor.
It's a tumbleweed. Of course, you've never seen a real live tumbleweed before. You'd better keep a close eye on it.
You see nothing special about this cactus.
You see nothing important about this cactus.
A dead tree. Nothing grows well here.
If you can see this, blame the technical designer.
A natural extension of the rock floor.
A natural extension of the rock floor.
There is nothing out of the ordinary with this bloody stain. Except, of course, that someone or something died here.
This thick column of rock extends from floor to ceiling.
This thin column of rock extends from floor to ceiling.
You study the rocks for a while, but they never move.
You keep a close eye on these rocks, in case they move to attack you.
A large pile of rocks. They look indigenous to this region.
A large pile of bleached animal bones. At least, you think all the bones are animal...
A large pile of bleached animal bones. At least, you think all the bones are animal...
A very large pile of bleached bones. You cannot determine the species of the dead critters.
You think these might be Horned Kangaroo bones, but you cannot be sure. They are too weathered to make a final determination.
You see the bones of a large, two-headed cow.
A wooden gate. It opens, and closes, and opens, and closes, and...
A very large pile of rocks. They look dangerous just sitting there.
A large pile of rocks. If you look closely, you can see the faces of little old men in the sides of the stones.
Rocks, rocks, rocks! Everywhere you look, rocks!
This modern version of an alcohol still could generously be called a micro-brewery.
A rotting old chair made out of an ancient car seat.
A smelly old chair that used be to a car seat. The springs have lost their spring.
A rotting, smelly old chair sitting on bricks for support. Looks pretty uncomfortable.
A rotting, smelly old chair sitting on bricks for support. Looks pretty uncomfortable.
A very uncomfortable looking sitting device, sometimes known as a couch.
A very uncomfortable looking sitting device, sometimes known as a couch.
An old rubber tire sitting in the middle of some weeds.
It's a rusted car door leaning on a rusted metal barrel. A whole lot of rust is going on.
A broken toilet, half-buried in the sand. Life's a pisser, then you die.
Some sort of desert scrub. If it was growing in the recent past, it isn't now.
A car tire, buried in the sand. Some small pieces of wood are piled up around it.
On closer examination, you think these might actually be pieces of petrified wood.
A small pile of dirt, with a dead weed sticking out of it.
A small pile of dirt, with a dry weed sticking out of it.
A twisted piece of rusted metal.
A small pile of random junk.
There is some sort of rank, disgusting smell coming from this sewer drain. After a few moments, it doesn't smell as bad.
You can barely make out some movement behind the grate covering this drain. You can see small red eyes peering back at you. Rat eyes.
Gurgling water sounds come from this drain. So does a really vile stench.
Gurgling water sounds come from beyond this drain. So does a really vile smell.
It's an old, fairly rickety ladder. It looks like it will barely support your weight.
It looks like an access hole for the sewer system.
This looks like a standard Vault door that has been damaged, perhaps burned. It is still functional, however.
This looks like a standard Vault door that has been damaged, perhaps burned. It is still functional, however.
A heavy man-hole cover. It looks like it is in good shape, and that it was recently moved.
A large hole has been blasted through this door.
A large hole has been blasted through this door.
Completely unbreakable glass. Don't even try.
Completely unbreakable glass. Don't even try.
Completely unbreakable glass. Don't even try.
Completely unbreakable glass. Don't even try.
This door is a piece of high-technology construction. It opens by dilating as it rotates the three pieces that make up the door.
This door is a piece of high-technology construction. It opens by dilating as it rotates the three pieces that make up the door.
This door is emblazoned with the Brotherhood of Steel symbol.
This door is emblazoned with the Brotherhood of Steel symbol.
This is the interior of a Brotherhood elevator. It is squeaky clean!
This is the interior of a Brotherhood elevator. It is squeaky clean!
This is the symbol of the Brotherhood of Steel. This marker tells the wasteland that this is their area, and to leave immediately.
You see a computer monitor. It is made from Brotherhood technology.
You see a computer monitor. It is made from Brotherhood technology.
This is a computer memory databank. It is obviously Brotherhood technology.
This is a computer memory databank. It is obviously Brotherhood technology.
A high-tech computer, using modern reel-to-reel storage devices instead of the antiquated punch cards.
A high-tech computer, using modern reel-to-reel storage devices instead of the antiquated punch cards.
You see a computer monitor. It is made from Brotherhood technology.
You see a computer monitor. It is made from Brotherhood technology.
This computer controls the large vault door. You have to enter a specific access code for the computer to work.
It looks like an advertisement for Gizmo's Casino.
This large door is the link between the vault and the outside world.
This large door is the link between the vault and the outside world.
This part of the sign contains an electric motor that is slowly spinning the attached neon sign.
You are looking at a portion of an elevator.
This is a dumb terminal, hooked up by cable to a large computer. It is Brotherhood technology.
This is a dumb terminal, hooked up by cable to a large computer. It is Brotherhood technology.
The symbol of the Brotherhood. The gears represent their engineering knowledge, the sword is their will to defend themselves and the wings are the uplifting hope.
The symbol of the Brotherhood. The gears represent their engineering knowledge, the sword is their will to defend themselves and the wings are the uplifting hope.
You think this could mean that you are on level one of the Brotherhood.
You are on level two of the Brotherhood.
This must mean that you are on level three of the Brotherhood.
You must be on level four of the Brotherhood.
A military-style bunk bed. Looks very uncomfortable. Also looks like you could bounce a quarter off of these sheets.
A military-style bunk bed. Looks very uncomfortable. Also looks like you could bounce a quarter off of these sheets.
A military-style bunk bed. Looks very uncomfortable. Also looks like you could bounce a quarter off of these sheets.
The advertising on the side of this machine promotes their popular soda.
It looks like a perfectly good trapdoor.
The ladder in this manhole leads down into the darkness below. Ohhh, scary.
People stand behind this and talk. It looks like it has a little place to hold a prepared speech.
This looks just like you would expect it to. Nothing special about this pew.
The sign on this post looks a little rusty.
The sign on this post looks a little rusty.
The sign on this post looks a little rusty.
The sign on this post looks a little rusty.
The sign on this post looks a little rusty.
An old, beat-up mattress. You think you see some sort of small bug-like critter infesting it.
Even if you were to sleep by yourself on this thing, you would not be sleeping alone.
A make-shift bed. The material was scavenged from some other source.
A make-shift bed. The material was scavenged from some other source.
This bed has seen better days (and probably nights, too.)
On closer examination, you determine that the sheets have not been changed in a very, very long time.
There are a couple stains of dubious origin on this well-worn sleeping device.
This bed has seen a lot of use and wear. Something must have crawled between the mattresses and died, too.
These wooden boxes are falling apart from the weather.
You find no details worth mentioning about these wooden boxes.
You have a lot of time on your hands to be looking closely at this rotten junk.
These wooden boxes are falling apart from the weather.
This automobile is in terrible shape. You cannot think of a way to restore it.
This rusted piece of scrap-metal cannot be restored.
You determine that this vehicle will never drive again. Really.
There is no way that this junkyard wannabe will ever drive again.
If the Mechanic of the Year suddenly appeared next to you, both of you could not fix this rusty heap.
This chair looks like it has seen better years.
This chair is moldy and gross. As you can guess, it stinks, too.
This chair is falling apart. Quickly.
If someone paid you a lot of caps, and you could use steel britches, you might consider sitting in this chair.
This looks like an old office chair, still in pretty good shape after all these years.
This is an old office chair. It might even support the weight of a person.
This office chair has seen better days. It's pretty much trash, now.
This looks like a chair you would see in a mortician's office - dead.
This is a fire hydrant. Without Vault ceiling sprinklers, you might need one of these to put out fires.
This lamp post looks like it is still in working condition. Imagine that, something that works out here.
This lamp post will never work again.
This is a working lamp post. At night, it casts a pale, gentle light that reminds you of absolutely nothing.
This is a broken lamp post. It cannot be fixed.
The light in this lamp post is shattered beyond repair.
This is a functional lamp post.
The lock on this gate has been jammed shut and the bars look very sturdy.
Definitely useless junk, no doubt about it.
Definitely useless junk, no doubt about it.
Definitely useless junk, no doubt about it.
Definitely useless junk, no doubt about it.
Definitely useless junk, no doubt about it.
The mailbox is empty. You get the feeling it's been that way for a while.
A nicely crafted wooden door, in good condition.
A nicely crafted wooden door, in good condition.
A nicely crafted wooden door, in good condition.
A nicely crafted wooden door, in good condition.
This wooden pew is slowly falling apart.
This pew has been neglected, and is showing signs of wear and tear.
A wooden pew that has succumbed to the effects of age and abuse.
The newspaper machine is empty. It looks like it once held adult magazines.
A bed matters in terrible condition. Even the rats won't sleep in or on it.
A twin bed matters that has seen many better days than this one.
A pile of rotted and weathered wood. Not worth it's weight in, well, anything.
A pile of wood, with some rusty useless nails imbedded deeply.
A pile of old, cardboard boxes. You cannot believe that they have survived for this long.
A pile of old, cardboard boxes.
Some junk that you think might have been a bed matters before it was destroyed by the environment.
A small pile of rubbled stones and rocks. Watch your step!
A porcelain sink that has long lost the ability to function.
A broken porcelain sink. There is small puddle of brown water in the basin, with a floating dead rat.
This sink is not functional. You can tell this from the large crack down the middle.
A broken porcelain sink. There is small puddle of brown water in the basin, with a floating dead rat.
A red sign with the word STOP written in large block letters.
A red sign with the word STOP written in large block letters. The large bullet hole was added after manufacturing.
This is an ancient automobile traffic control device.
This is an ancient automobile traffic control device.
This is an ancient automobile traffic control device.
This street light provides illumination after night falls, or in darkened areas.

A wooden table, in fair to middling condition.
A wooden table, in fair to middling condition.
A wooden table, in middling to poor condition.
A wooden table, with plastic surface, that has been broken for a while.
A wooden table, painted a puke green color, that is beyond repair.
This looks like an old coffee table, low to the ground for those really short mutants.
This looks like an old coffee table, low to the ground for those really short mutants.
The sharpened edges around the seat make this a very uncomfortable place to sit.
Yuck! Whoever used this last did not flush!
This toilet is broken and definitely not useable if you're a woman.
Some busted pipes half-buried in the dirt. Nothing important to see here. Move along.
Some broken pieces of glass and other ruined pieces of junk.
Some broken pieces of glass and other ruined pieces of junk.
A pipe that has been snapped in half. It looks like it rusted until it collapsed under it's own weight.
A trash can. You can barely read the label: Keep your city streets clean!
A stump. Nothing really exciting. In fact, this might be the least exciting thing you have ever laid your eyes on.
The ruined remains of a diesel truck. This hunk of metal will never move again.
This diesel truck is beyond help. Way beyond help.
This bath tub is broken and cracked.
On closer examination, you realize that you won't be taking your bath in this tub after all.
It's just a urinal. Nothing special.
It's just a urinal. Nothing special.
A large tank that holds liquids. In this case, you believe that it was designed to store water.
A wooden door. Nothing extremely interesting about it.
A wooden door. It provides an entrance and egress from this building.
This lamp looks it is in good working condition.
A broken lamp. It is not surprising that it does not work.

This was a sign to control the flow of traffic.
The sign is faded, but you can make out the world YIELD.
If you can see this, blame the technical designer.
An ornate wooden door. It is obviously made from fine workmanship.
This seat is supported by large concrete bricks. That's not important, but you're the one who looked.

This curtain looks like it was created by primitive means, but it is very functional.
This curtain looks like it was created by primitive means, but it is very functional.
A finely crafted wooden bowl. This looks like it was designed to crush and separate grains.
It looks like a mutated cabbage to you. It seems to be thriving in the warm weather.

A wooden crate. It doesn't look in that bad of shape.

A large amount of rock, far more than could ever be moved easily.
This submerged car cannot be repaired.
This car is a little wet, and cannot be repaired.
This car has been poorly parked. Unfortunately, it is beyond repair.
This junk has been ruined by the contaminated seawater.
This junk has almost washed away.
A choice selection of useless junk.
These pipes used to transfer fuel from an underground tank to the garage. They haven't been used in a long time.

This door leads to the elevator car. If you want to use the elevator, you must first open this door.
A metal pipe. Further details are not important.
A pile of rocks. Not very interesting.

A complex of some sort. You are not sure, but you can see large vats of a greenish goo that looks vaguely important.

A simple altar made from painted wood.
This podium is normal, except for the Children of the Cathedral symbol engraved on the front of it.
A large monitor, black and white only. The reception is pretty good for being indoors without an antenna.
